## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss ongoing projects and updates.](https://fathom.video/share/Syqvwz2GD-xkFBU_hWSjwt54B7hT8zK_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Meeting rescheduled due to power outage in Puerto Vallarta affecting some participants](https://fathom.video/share/Syqvwz2GD-xkFBU_hWSjwt54B7hT8zK_?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Sargassum-related content performing well, balancing realism with optimism](https://fathom.video/share/Syqvwz2GD-xkFBU_hWSjwt54B7hT8zK_?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Ongoing communication with clients reported as positive](https://fathom.video/share/Syqvwz2GD-xkFBU_hWSjwt54B7hT8zK_?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Workflows still in active use by the team](https://fathom.video/share/Syqvwz2GD-xkFBU_hWSjwt54B7hT8zK_?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)

## Topics

### Technical Issues

### Health Updates
